title: Matrix Zero - Enter the Anime Multiverse
description: 6-shot, 30-second anime demo showcasing identity preservation across scene changes with two iconic characters

goku.name: Goku
goku.description: Spiky black hair, orange gi martial arts uniform, muscular build, confident warrior energy

naruto.name: Naruto
naruto.description: Spiky blonde hair, blue eyes, orange and black ninja outfit, headband with leaf symbol, whisker marks on cheeks

cosmic_void.name: Cosmic Void
cosmic_void.description: Deep space with swirling blue and purple energy, stars and galaxies in background, ethereal atmosphere

hidden_leaf_rooftop.name: Hidden Leaf Rooftop
hidden_leaf_rooftop.description: Traditional Japanese rooftop overlooking a ninja village, orange sunset sky, distant mountains

crossover_dimension.name: Crossover Dimension
crossover_dimension.description: Epic dimensional rift where two worlds meet, golden energy beams, dramatic clouds, heroic atmosphere

scenes.title: The Call
scenes.description: Goku in cosmic void - the legendary warrior's invitation

shots.description: Wide shot - Goku floating in cosmic void, energy swirling around him
shots.prompt: goku, anime style, spiky black hair, orange gi, floating in deep space cosmic void, swirling blue and purple energy around him, stars and galaxies background, full body wide shot, arms crossed confidently, powerful aura glowing, epic anime scene, high quality anime art, dramatic lighting, 4k
shots.negative_prompt: realistic, 3d render, photo, blurry, deformed, bad anatomy, extra limbs, watermark, text, low quality

shots.description: Close-up - Goku's confident smile, reaching out hand
shots.prompt: goku, anime style, spiky black hair, close-up portrait, cosmic void background blurred, confident smile, reaching hand toward camera, inviting gesture, glowing aura, dynamic anime expression, high quality anime art, dramatic rim lighting, 4k
shots.negative_prompt: realistic, 3d render, photo, blurry, deformed, bad anatomy, extra limbs, watermark, text, low quality

dialogue.text: Hey! You feel that power? Come with me!

scenes.title: The Path
scenes.description: Naruto on rooftop - the ninja's determination

shots.description: Wide shot - Naruto standing on rooftop overlooking village
shots.prompt: naruto uzumaki, anime style, spiky blonde hair, blue eyes, orange and black ninja outfit, leaf headband, standing on traditional japanese rooftop, overlooking ninja village, orange sunset sky, wind blowing hair, full body wide shot, heroic pose, high quality anime art, warm sunset lighting, 4k

shots.description: Close-up - Naruto's determined expression, fist raised
shots.prompt: naruto uzumaki, anime style, spiky blonde hair, blue eyes, whisker marks on cheeks, leaf headband, close-up portrait, sunset sky background blurred, determined expression, raising fist toward camera, confident grin, high quality anime art, golden hour lighting, 4k
shots.negative_prompt: realistic, 3d render, photo, blurry, deformed, bad anatomy, extra limbs, watermark, text, low quality

dialogue.text: Believe it! This is just the beginning!

scenes.title: The Convergence
scenes.description: Both heroes unite - the ultimate crossover

shots.description: Medium shot - Both characters standing side by side
shots.prompt: goku and naruto uzumaki standing side by side, anime style, goku with spiky black hair orange gi on left, naruto with spiky blonde hair orange ninja outfit on right, epic dimensional rift background, golden energy beams, dramatic clouds, both in heroic battle stance, medium shot showing upper body, high quality anime art, epic crossover scene, dramatic backlighting, 4k

shots.description: Close-up - Both looking at camera, final heroic moment
shots.prompt: goku and naruto uzumaki close-up portrait together, anime style, goku spiky black hair on left looking at camera with confident smirk, naruto spiky blonde hair blue eyes on right looking at camera with determined grin, epic dimensional background blurred, golden light between them, both characters clearly distinct, high quality anime art, dramatic anime finale shot, 4k

global_ambience.prompt: epic orchestral ambient atmosphere, heroic tension, anime battle preparation mood

_meta.notes: Anime pivot - Goku & Naruto dual character demo for VC presentation. Tests multi-character identity consistency with CLIP checker at 0.85 threshold.
